title: Decision Flowchart for Hypothesis Testing Using Significance Levels
description: A flowchart depicting the process of making a decision to reject or fail to reject a null hypothesis based on comparing a p-value to a pre-determined level of significance (α).
relationships: Choose α leads to Calculate p-value
Compare leads to Reject H₀ if p-value ≤ α
Compare leads to Fail to Reject H₀ if p-value > α
Both decision nodes lead to End
